reviews.author: Vinay Yadav
reviews.review_body:
This is best School in Greater Noida. We due to trasnfer from there I have two job location My Daughter Was stud ying in that.. Beautiful foundation they have developed in my chaild.. Tht foundatio  is still intact and working good. I really miss that school... For mu daughter.. Teaching Method and style are great... Parents can trust this school.. Great .
We left thee in 2021 even after 3 year I missed that school..

reviews.author: Kritika Negi
reviews.review_body: Father Agnel School in Noida stands as an esteemed educational institution known for its commitment to holistic learning and character development. Nestled in the vibrant city of Noida, this school boasts state-of-the-art facilities and a dedicated faculty that fosters academic excellence, extracurricular participation, and values-driven education. With a rich heritage in nurturing young minds and providing a well-rounded educational experience, Father Agnel School stands as a beacon of quality education, preparing students for the challenges of the modern world while instilling strong moral and ethical values.

reviews.author: sarita sharma
reviews.review_body: A good school for middle class family students. The school is Christian missionary and there is good discipline maintained. The teachers are good and there is a good academic environment. I as a mother of two children having studied in this school am proud to have such an institution for my children.

reviews.author: nitin azad
reviews.review_body: I saw lot of post where parents have mentioned that they favour Christian students. What I have heard, yes they give preference while giving admission but post that they treat all student equally. If people have problem in that then please go for thakur minority, jain minority, sikh minority, hindu minority, muslim minority... Why you are admitting your kids to this school then? No one questioned on hindu, muslim and sikh minority school.... Pls don't play religious politics in school... Atleast let education free from politics..
